title: Biology for Mortals
subtitle: Exploring Nature's Hidden Code
author: Wordsus Team
description: Explore the mysteries of life through 365 fascinating lessons. From DNA and genetics to evolution and deep ecology, explained simply for everyone.

chapters.title: DNA Scissors: Rewriting the Manual of Life
chapters.description: Discover how CRISPR technology allows us to edit the genetic code. We explore the promises and risks of this fascinating biological tool.

chapters.title: Beyond the Gene: How the Environment Shapes Your Destiny
chapters.description: We analyze epigenetics, the amazing field that explains how your lifestyle and environment turn genes on or off without altering your DNA.

chapters.title: Return from Beyond: Resurrecting Lost Species
chapters.description: Learn about de-extinction scientific projects that seek to bring back to life the woolly mammoth, the dodo, and other extinct animals.

chapters.title: Ancient Heritage: The Neanderthal Within Us
chapters.description: We explore the fascinating evolutionary history and why the vast majority of modern humans retain Neanderthal DNA that affects our health.

chapters.title: The Internal Clock: Telomeres and Aging
chapters.description: Delve into the mystery of telomeres, the chromosomal structures that act as a biological clock and dictate exactly how our cells age.

chapters.title: Two in One: The Strange Case of Human Chimerism
chapters.description: Discover the amazing phenomenon of human genetic chimerism, where the exact same person possesses two different sets of DNA very naturally.

chapters.title: Identity Theft: Borrowed Genes Between Species
chapters.description: Learn about horizontal gene transfer, the incredible process by which certain organisms steal DNA from other species in order to survive.

chapters.title: Real Superpowers: Incredible Genetic Mutations
chapters.description: We explore exceptional human biological variations, from almost unbreakable bones to natural immunity against various viruses and diseases.

chapters.title: The Common Ancestor: Searching for the Origin of All Life
chapters.description: Travel billions of years into the past to discover LUCA, the primordial microorganism from which absolutely all current life descends.

chapters.title: Dolly and Her Friends: The Science Behind Cloning
chapters.description: We analyze advances in biological cloning technology, from Dolly the sheep to the controversial industry of replicating deceased pets.

chapters.title: A Hidden Universe: The Inhabitants of Your Own Body
chapters.description: Discover the human microbiome and how the trillions of bacteria, fungi, and viruses in your body control your digestion, health, and emotions.

chapters.title: Microscopic Hunters: Phages Against Bacteria
chapters.description: Meet the bacteriophages, amazing biological viruses that destroy deadly bacterial infections and could save humanity in the near future.

chapters.title: Little Titans: The Indestructible Water Bears Today
chapters.description: We explore the incredible biology of tardigrades, amazing micro-animals capable of surviving radiation, dehydration, and outer space.

chapters.title: Life on the Edge: Beings Where There Should Be Nothing
chapters.description: Delve into the world of extremophiles, those mysterious biological organisms that thrive in the Antarctic ice and in boiling acid waters.

chapters.title: Immortal Cells: The Medical Legacy of Henrietta Lacks
chapters.description: The fascinating and tragic story of HeLa cells, an immortal biological lineage that completely revolutionized modern medicine and cellular studies.

chapters.title: Light in the Dark: Fascinating Bioluminescence Today
chapters.description: We analyze the incredible natural biological chemistry that allows fireflies, fungi, and strange abyssal creatures to create their own bright light.

chapters.title: Blank Canvases: The Great Potential of Stem Cells
chapters.description: Discover the regenerative power of stem cells, biological structures that can transform into any tissue to repair our entire body.

chapters.title: The Final Sacrifice: How Apoptosis Saves Your Body
chapters.description: We explore apoptosis, the elegant mechanism of programmed cell elimination that purges defective cells and prevents serious medical diseases.

chapters.title: Internal Warriors: The Battles of Your Immune System
chapters.description: Travel inside the human body to learn how white blood cells hunt, memorize, and destroy pathogens in real microscopic inner wars.

chapters.title: Unstoppable Evolution: The Danger of Superbugs
chapters.description: We analyze how the misuse of antibiotics has caused the rapid biological evolution of resistant bacteria that threaten modern medicine.

chapters.title: Rewiring Your Mind: Amazing Neuroplasticity Today
chapters.description: Discover the surprising neurobiology behind the human brain's ability to heal, adapt, and radically modify its own neural networks.

chapters.title: The Second Brain: How the Gut Guides Your Emotions
chapters.description: We explore the strange direct biological connection between the bacteria in your digestive system and mental health via the mysterious vagus nerve.

chapters.title: Tasting Colors: The Strange World of Synesthesia
chapters.description: Delve into the neural networks of synesthesia, a fascinating biological condition where senses mix in very extraordinary and unique ways.

chapters.title: The Great Enigma: The Biological Roots of Consciousness
chapters.description: We investigate the deepest neurobiological mystery of all: how a mass of soft cellular tissue is able to generate our conscious human mind.

chapters.title: The Power of Belief: The True Biology Behind the Placebo
chapters.description: We analyze how the brain's expectation of a cure manages to trigger completely real physical, chemical, and healing changes in the organism.

chapters.title: Neural Rebellion: What Happens in the Teen Brain
chapters.description: Understand the drastic biological changes, synaptic pruning, and delayed frontal development that explain why puberty is so very turbulent.

chapters.title: Formula for Joy: The Biology of Our Emotions
chapters.description: Discover how dopamine, serotonin, and other biological molecules mechanically interact in the brain to effectively regulate our mental well-being.

chapters.title: Alternate Realities: The Biological Importance of Dreaming
chapters.description: Explore why the brain temporarily paralyzes us and generates illusory worlds every night during REM sleep to consolidate all our memory.

chapters.title: New Neurons: The Myth Busted About Our Brain
chapters.description: We tear down scientific dogmas to understand neurogenesis, the incredible biological process where the adult brain generates brand new cells.

chapters.title: Brain Wash: Nightly Cleansing of Our Mind Today
chapters.description: Learn about the amazing glymphatic system of neurobiology, a mechanism that literally washes your brain of metabolic waste while you are sleeping.

chapters.title: Eight-Armed Minds: The Intelligence of Cephalopods
chapters.description: Dive into the amazing biology of the octopus, a marine genius with neurons distributed in each tentacle that allow it to think decentralized.

chapters.title: Cheating Death: The Incredible Immortal Jellyfish Today
chapters.description: We analyze the fascinating biological life cycle of Turritopsis dohrnii, a tiny marine jellyfish that continuously rejuvenates to survive.

chapters.title: Masters of Repair: The Regeneration of the Axolotl
chapters.description: We explore the amazing biological regenerative capacity of the axolotl, an amazing amphibian capable of completely rebuilding its lost organs.

chapters.title: Vision by Sound: The Science Behind Echolocation
chapters.description: Discover the brilliant biological mechanism used by bats and dolphins to map the physical world around them using bouncing sound frequencies.

chapters.title: Swarm Intelligence: The Superorganism in Action
chapters.description: We analyze the complex biological and social dynamics of ants and bees, where thousands of tiny minds synchronize to act as a single being.

chapters.title: Frozen Hearts: The Biological Art of Hibernation
chapters.description: Explore how wood frogs survive being literally frozen solid during the harsh winter using natural cryogenics, and wake up right in the spring.

chapters.title: Masters of Deception: Cephalopod Camouflage Today
chapters.description: Learn the amazing biological tricks of octopuses and cuttlefish to radically change the color, pattern, and texture of their skin in milliseconds.

chapters.title: Generational Travelers: The Great Route of the Butterflies
chapters.description: Be amazed by the monarch butterflies and their epic migration, where multiple generations are born and die guided by an infallible genetic compass.

chapters.title: A Moving Forest: The Strange Symbiosis of the Sloth
chapters.description: Discover the amazing biological ecosystem hidden in the fur of sloths, home to moths and algae that fully cooperate for their mutual survival.

chapters.title: Hidden Languages: How Great Animals Communicate
chapters.description: We investigate the complex communicative skills of animal biology, from the clicks of sperm whales to the highly mathematical dances of bees.

chapters.title: The Forest Internet: How Trees Communicate
chapters.description: Delve into the forest underground to discover the extensive mycorrhizal networks that trees biologically use to share essential nutrients.

chapters.title: Hunting Plants: The Evolution of Carnivorous Flora
chapters.description: We analyze extreme botanical adaptations, where poor soils forced certain plants to develop lethal and precise traps to catch animal prey.

chapters.title: Domino Effect: The Impact of a Single Species on Life
chapters.description: Understand ecological trophic cascades and observe how the reintroduction of large predators is vital to heal the biology of an entire ecosystem.

chapters.title: Sensitive Botany: The Fascinating Plants That Feel
chapters.description: Discover the phenomenon of thigmonasty, an amazing biological reflex that allows some plants to move and close their leaves upon feeling contact.

chapters.title: Masters of Illusion: Orchids That Deceive Insects
chapters.description: Learn about the incredible evolutionary tricks of orchids that visually and chemically mimic female insects to safely guarantee their pollination.

chapters.title: Extreme Resistance: Surviving in the Burning Desert
chapters.description: We explore the photosynthetic biological adaptation used by cacti, breathing exclusively at night to successfully avoid evaporating under the intense sun.

chapters.title: The Return of Life: Rebirth After the Natural Disaster
chapters.description: Accompany nature in its methodical and biological process to rebuild entire plant and animal communities after highly devastating disasters.

chapters.title: Plant Chemical Warfare: The Silent Battle of the Forest
chapters.description: Discover biological allelopathy, the ruthless strategy where some plants secrete toxic compounds to effectively prevent others from germinating nearby.

chapters.title: Internal Recycling: When Cells Clean Themselves
chapters.description: We investigate autophagy, the biological process triggered during fasting where the body recycles old cellular structures for rejuvenation.

chapters.title: The Sun Clock: Understanding Your Circadian Rhythms Today
chapters.description: We analyze the physiological functioning of our master biological clock and how natural light coordinates the work of every organ of the human body.

chapters.title: Archives of the Blood: The Memory of Your Immune System
chapters.description: Be amazed by the incredible physiological capacity of lymphocytes, cells that can perfectly remember specific pathogens decades after facing them.

chapters.title: Humans of the Heights: Physiology of Extreme Survival
chapters.description: Discover how certain human populations have adapted their cellular biology and respiratory physiology to thrive healthily on the peaks of the world.
